texts.orig: From 0 to 1,99 years, sharing with 2 adults: free of charge From 2 to 11,99 years, sharing with 2 adults: 50% discount 1 Adult and 1 Child (2 - 11,99 years) = no discount 2 Children in one room (2 - 11,99 years) = no discount Baby Cot: on request free of charge

texts.orig: Deluxe Garden View Suite : KES 3,150 & USD 30 & EURO 25 per room per day Premium Garden View Suite : KES 4,000 & USD 40 & EURO 35 per room per day Ocean View Suite : KES 4,800 & USD 45 & EURO 40 per room per day Deluxe Ocean View Suite : KES 5,500 & USD 50 & EURO 45 per room per day Gala Dinner New Year : KES 11,400 & USD 105 & EURO 95 per person

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payments are to be undertaken as follows: 30% deposit payment (non refundable) upon reservation Balance of payment 30 days prior to arrival If within 30 days prior to arrival full payment is required and is non-refundable
texts.text: Payments are to be undertaken as follows: 30% deposit payment (non refundable) upon reservation Balance of payment 30 days prior to arrival If within 30 days prior to arrival full payment is required and is non-refundable

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If booking is cancelled or no show the full amount shall be withheld as it is considered as non-refundable. In case of cause of force majeure like Covid-19, a voucher shall be issued with a validity of 12 months.
texts.text: If booking is cancelled or no show the full amount shall be withheld as it is considered as non-refundable. In case of cause of force majeure like Covid-19, a voucher shall be issued with a validity of 12 months.
